name: Activity Log retention period less than 365 days
description: The Activity Log retention period is configured to less than 365 days. Forensic investigations and compliance audits frequently require more than 90 days of historical activity log data.
remediation: Set log retention to at least 365 days. Use Azure Monitor Diagnostic Settings to send activity logs to a Log Analytics workspace (custom retention up to 2 years) or an Azure Storage Account (unlimited retention). Archive logs to cold storage after 90 days.
